body: Hi, can I move my Thursday PT session to later in the afternoon? Something around 4 or 4:30 would work much better with my schedule.
Hi Marcus, this is Monica at Iron City Sports Medicine. I have a 4:15 with Shannon open this Thursday. Want me to move you there?
4:15 is perfect, please go ahead and switch it.
All set, you're booked Thursday at 4:15 with Shannon. You'll get a reminder text the day before. Closing this out, see you then.
Dr. at Southern Orthopedics referred me to you for shoulder rehab. How do I set up my first evaluation?
Welcome Deandra. We have your referral on file. I can get you in for an initial eval with Shannon next Tuesday at 9am or Wednesday at 11am. Which works?
I need to cancel my appointment this coming Monday. I'll be out of town for the holidays.
No problem Tyler, I've canceled Monday with no fee since you gave us plenty of notice. Want me to pencil you in for the first week of January?
Great, I've rebooked you for January 5 at 10am with Shannon. Happy holidays, closing this out.
Before I schedule, does my Blue Cross plan cover physical therapy visits before I've met my deductible?

Hi Renata, Dr. Lawson here. With most BCBS of Alabama plans, PT applies to your deductible first, then coinsurance. We can verify your specific benefits before your first visit so there are no surprises.
We ran your benefits: PT is covered with a $40 copay after deductible. Monica will reach out to book your eval. Closing this out.
My standing 8am slot has been great, but Shannon suggested twice a week. Can I add a second day?
Absolutely Jerome. I can keep your Monday 8am and add Thursday 8am with Shannon. I'll confirm once I block both on the schedule.
The intake forms link you emailed won't load for me. It just spins and never opens.
Sorry about that Alana. I re-sent a fresh intake link and you can also fill the forms here at the front desk 15 minutes early if it's easier. Let me know if the new link works.
I think I was charged a copay twice for my January 6 visit. Can you check?
You're right Karina, our billing system posted the $40 copay twice. I've reversed the duplicate and it will return to your card in 3 to 5 business days. Apologies for the mix-up. Closing this out.
Do you have any evening slots? My work runs late and I keep barely missing my afternoon sessions.
Hi Ray, Shannon holds a few 5:30pm slots on Tuesdays and Thursdays. I can move your sessions to Tuesday 5:30. Want me to lock that in going forward?
Just confirming my knee rehab follow-up time for next week. I have it down as Thursday but wanted to double check.
Confirmed Nicole, you're on for Thursday at 1pm with Shannon for your knee follow-up. See you then, closing this out.
I'm running about 15 minutes late to my 2pm. Can I still be seen or should I reschedule?
Come on in Owen, Shannon can still see you, we'll just do a slightly shorter session. Drive safe.
Glad we got you in today. Closing this out, see you at your next session.
Do you have any Saturday appointments? My son rolled his ankle at practice and I'd like to get him in.
Hi Tameka, we run a limited Saturday morning clinic twice a month. The next one is Saturday the 21st, and Shannon has a 9:30 open for an ankle eval. Should I book it?
Please cancel my Wednesday appointment, I'm feeling under the weather and don't want to bring anything in.
Thanks for letting us know Priscilla, I've canceled Wednesday with no fee. Feel better and just message us when you're ready to rebook.
I didn't get my appointment reminder text this week and almost forgot. Can you check that my number is right?
Sorry about that Dwight. Your number was missing a digit in our system, I've corrected it so reminders will go out 24 hours ahead from now on. Closing this out.
Do I need a new referral to keep going with my PT plan, or is the original one still good?
Hi Lena, your referral from Andrews Sports Medicine covers 12 visits and you have 4 remaining. We'll request an updated referral before that runs out so there's no gap. Closing this out.
Any chance I can move my Friday session up to Thursday this week?
Hi Andre, Shannon has a 3pm open Thursday. I'll move you there and free up your Friday slot. I'll confirm once it's done.
I'd like to book a gait analysis with Shannon. I've had recurring shin pain when I run and want it looked at.
Great idea Hector. Gait analyses run about 60 minutes. Shannon has Tuesday the 16th at 10am or Friday the 19th at 2pm. Which do you prefer?
Booked you Tuesday the 16th at 10am for the gait analysis. Wear your usual running shoes. Closing this out.
My name is spelled wrong on my appointment records, it's Courtney with an ou, not Cortney.
Fixed, Courtney. I've corrected the spelling across your chart and reminders. Thanks for catching that, closing this out.
Could you email me a copy of my visit summary from last week? I need it for my primary care doctor.
Hi Earl, I've sent your visit summary to the email on file through our secure patient portal. Let me know if it doesn't arrive. Closing this out.
I'm having knee surgery next month and want to get my post-op rehab appointments set up ahead of time.

Smart to plan ahead Monique. Once you have your surgery date, send it over and I'll block a recurring twice-weekly series with Shannon starting about a week after. We'll adjust as your recovery progresses.
The online scheduler won't let me pick a 6pm slot even though the website lists evening hours.
Thanks for flagging Spencer. Our last evening slot is 5:30pm, the website hours were out of date and I've passed that along to fix. I booked you for 5:30 Thursday with Shannon. Closing this out.
I need to reschedule, my work shift got changed and conflicts with my appointment time.
No problem Gloria. What days and times work with your new shift? I'll find a slot with Shannon that fits and move you over.
Hi Monica, it's Coach Washington from Crestwood. Two of our track athletes need eval slots with Shannon, one hamstring and one shin splints. Can we get them in this week?
Hey Coach, Shannon can see both Friday afternoon back to back, 3pm and 3:45. Send me their names and guardian contact info and I'll get them on the schedule.
